2026-04-01T02:46:36.1411645Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-01T02:46:36.1412720Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-01T02:46:36.1414329Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-01T02:46:36.1414769Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:36.1414973Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-01T02:46:36.1415297Z

2026-04-01T02:46:36.1415768Z

2026-04-01T02:46:36.9473294Z Repository permission level: admin
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9538111Z Redacted URL: chatgpt.com
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9680408Z Redacted URL: chatgpt.com
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9688570Z text: Support multiple model config slots and set Google AI Studio default to gemini-flash-latest
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9689437Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9689660Z ### Motivation
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9690568Z - Change Google AI Studio default model from `gemini-2.5-pro` to `gemini-flash-latest` to match expected provider behavior.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9692046Z - Fix the reload/save failure by making model settings loading more robust and returning server-persisted data after save.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9693530Z - Prepare the UI and data model for multiple configuration slots so display names can change independently from a stable identifier.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9694389Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9694592Z ### Description
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9696228Z - Updated default model strings to `gemini-flash-latest` in the mobile app defaults and backend runtime fallback (`apps/mobile_chat_app/.../llm_config_service.dart`, `apps/mobile_chat_app/.../model_settings_screen.dart`, and `apps/node_backend/src/llm/llm_service.ts`).
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9699317Z - Refactored `LlmConfig` and `LlmConfigService` to add `slotId`, introduce `fetchConfigs()` (returns a list) while keeping `fetchDefault()` as a helper, and make `save()` return the server-persisted `LlmConfig` and persist `slot_id` in the JSON payload.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9701938Z - Hardened API response parsing by safely converting dynamic maps and model preference structures when constructing `LlmConfig` instances.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9704473Z - Reworked the model settings UI to show a top "Configs" selector row with `ChoiceChip` buttons whose labels are computed from each config's model name (falling back to `Config N`), maintain a stable ID hint, preserve the existing API-key blank-to-keep behavior, and keep state list-based to support future multiple slots.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9706326Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9706521Z ### Testing
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9707454Z - Ran `./tools/init_dev_env.sh` successfully to bootstrap the development environment.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9709652Z - Ran `flutter analyze apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/model_settings_screen.dart apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/llm_config_service.dart` and it completed with no issues.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9711316Z - Installed Node dependencies with `cd apps/node_backend && npm ci` and the command succeeded.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9712465Z - Ran TypeScript type checking with `cd apps/node_backend && npm run type-check` and it completed successfully.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9714576Z - Attempted `dart format` across Dart and TypeScript files which reported errors because a TypeScript file was passed to the Dart formatter, but Dart files were formatted; subsequent toolchain validation (`flutter analyze`, `npm ci`, `npm run type-check`) verified the changes.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9716183Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9716342Z ------
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9716710Z [Codex Task]((chatgpt.com/redacted)
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9722179Z title: Support multiple model config slots and set Google AI Studio default to gemini-flash-latest
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9726534Z body: ### Motivation
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9727478Z - Change Google AI Studio default model from `gemini-2.5-pro` to `gemini-flash-latest` to match expected provider behavior.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9729556Z - Fix the reload/save failure by making model settings loading more robust and returning server-persisted data after save.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9735909Z - Prepare the UI and data model for multiple configuration slots so display names can change independently from a stable identifier.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9737704Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9737903Z ### Description
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9759969Z - Updated default model strings to `gemini-flash-latest` in the mobile app defaults and backend runtime fallback (`apps/mobile_chat_app/.../llm_config_service.dart`, `apps/mobile_chat_app/.../model_settings_screen.dart`, and `apps/node_backend/src/llm/llm_service.ts`).
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9763297Z - Refactored `LlmConfig` and `LlmConfigService` to add `slotId`, introduce `fetchConfigs()` (returns a list) while keeping `fetchDefault()` as a helper, and make `save()` return the server-persisted `LlmConfig` and persist `slot_id` in the JSON payload.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9765865Z - Hardened API response parsing by safely converting dynamic maps and model preference structures when constructing `LlmConfig` instances.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9779141Z - Reworked the model settings UI to show a top "Configs" selector row with `ChoiceChip` buttons whose labels are computed from each config's model name (falling back to `Config N`), maintain a stable ID hint, preserve the existing API-key blank-to-keep behavior, and keep state list-based to support future multiple slots.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9781376Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9781589Z ### Testing
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9782265Z - Ran `./tools/init_dev_env.sh` successfully to bootstrap the development environment.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9784211Z - Ran `flutter analyze apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/model_settings_screen.dart apps/mobile_chat_app/lib/features/settings/llm_config_service.dart` and it completed with no issues.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9786435Z - Installed Node dependencies with `cd apps/node_backend && npm ci` and the command succeeded.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9787637Z - Ran TypeScript type checking with `cd apps/node_backend && npm run type-check` and it completed successfully.
2026-04-01T02:46:36.9808118Z - Attempted `dart format` across Dart and TypeScript files which reported errors because a TypeScript file was passed to the Dart formatter, but Dart files were formatted; subsequent toolchain validation (`flutter analyze`, `npm ci`, `npm run type-check`) verified the changes.

const substitutePlaceholders = require('/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/substitute_placeholders.cjs');

// Call the substitution function
return await substitutePlaceholders({
  file: process.env.GH_AW_PROMPT,
  substitutions: {
    GH_AW_GITHUB_ACTOR: process.env.GH_AW_GITHUB_ACTOR,

2026-04-01T02:46:37.4069790Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4069954Z ## Your Task
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4070155Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4070369Z 1. Fetch the list of changed files in this PR.
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4071123Z 2. Read each changed file (focus on `.dart`, `.ts`, `.tsx`, `.js`, and migration SQL files).
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4071936Z 3. Apply the review criteria from the agent instructions.
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4072946Z 4. Post inline review comments only for real issues — do not comment on lines that are fine.
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4073552Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4073722Z ## Review Priorities
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4073974Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4075291Z 1. **Blockers** — security issues, null-safety violations, broken migrations, missing `mounted` guards, `undefined` passed as SQL params
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4078993Z 2. **Correctness** — logic errors, off-by-one errors, unhandled `async` errors
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4080165Z 3. **Convention** — ESM import style (`.js` extensions), Dart Effective Dart rules, missing dartdoc on public APIs
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4081189Z 4. **Tests** — new logic without corresponding tests
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4081696Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4081862Z ## Output Format
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4082539Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4083161Z For each issue found, create a **review comment** on the specific file and line using `create-pull-request-review-comment`.
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4083964Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4084122Z Each comment should:
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4084601Z - Be concise (2–4 sentences max)
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4085086Z - State what the problem is
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4085530Z - State why it matters
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4086122Z - Suggest the fix
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4086363Z 
2026-04-01T02:46:37.4086603Z If no issues are found, do not post any comments.
